title: Thai-Style Massaman Chicken Wrap
description: A fusion of Thai and Egyptian flavors in a crispy wrap. This recipe combines the richness of Massaman curry with the tenderness of chicken, all wrapped up in a crispy Egyptian flatbread.
instructions: 2. In a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
4. Add the Massaman curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
6. Add the tender coconut milk and cook until the sauce thickens, about 2-3 minutes.
7. Warm the Egyptian flatbread in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
8. Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the chicken mixture onto each flatbread, followed by a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
